problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
